issues.description: Condition is completely wrong. The text says 'If your Leader has the {Land of Wano} type or is [Portgas.D.Ace]', but DSL checks for a card named 'Portgas D. Ace' on board instead of checking the Leader's type or name.
Missing the 'or' clause for Land of Wano type. The condition should check if Leader has Land of Wano type OR is named Portgas.D.Ace.
AttachDon action is missing the source specification. The text says 'give up to 1 rested DON!! card', which means it should specify that the DON!! must be rested (not active).
AttachDon count should be 'up to 1' (optional), which typically requires an upTo or optional flag.
Duration should be 'DuringYourTurn' not 'EndOfTurn'. The text says 'during this turn' in the context of a [Your Turn] activated ability, meaning it applies during your turn only.
